vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix several issues with p2p xPyD in GET type
vllm.author: Csrayz
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix several issues with p2p xPyD in GET type:

When using GET mode, such a situation can occur. The GPU buffer size configuration is just at the critical value of the KV Cache size. Some requests larger than the buffer size will clear all tensors, causing next(iter(self.send_store)) to raise

vllm.author: bringlein

Purpose
This PR splits the triton_attn backend of V1 into two backends: One triton-only and platform-independent triton_attn  and one rocm-specific rocm_attn, including aiter kernels.
This facilitates easier maintenance of both backends. Also, adaptations to the vllm-internal triton backend then don

Purpose
PR #18343 introduced the Expert Parallelism Load Balancer (EPLB). By replicating a single logical expert into multiple physical experts, we can achieve better load balancing across experts.
However, this replication introduces some inference-time overhead: after the MoE routing module, we mu
